g.title: cluster_drain
g.text: commit drain — merge transaction family, preserve WAL order

g.title: decoder
g.text: raw stash: dirty tree · SMGR marker ·

g.title: merge
g.text: Raw → resolve_stash verdict at commit next_lsn:
Toast → chunk decode · Ordinary → row fanout

g.title: safe
g.text: stay behind open or unfinished work

g.title: dispatch
g.text: one shared walk keeps rows, TOAST,
and table changes in WAL order

g.title: consumer
g.text: live pipeline: ClickHouse or metrics only

g.title: legend
g.text: walk steps to pipeline / replay consumers
tie: catalog event BEFORE tuple (PG writes pg_class first)
heaps detoast post-merge; chunk maps resolve rows; ToastRows persist separately
saved restart point never passes open or unfinished transaction
